ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in cm */,
  "fitness_goal" TEXT /* User's fitness goal (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the fitness model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fitness model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the fitness model (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fitness model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the fitness model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time for the fitness model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the simulation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fitness model used for prediction */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* User-defined name for the simulation */,
  "simulation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  "predicted_fitness" REAL /* Predicted fitness score from the simulation */,
  "simulated_fitness" REAL /* Simulated fitness score based on input */,
  "same_different" INTEGER /* Indicates if the predicted and simulated results are the same or different */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES fitness_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness metric entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation associated with this metric */,
  "resting_heart_rate" REAL /* Resting heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "max_heart_rate" REAL /* Maximum heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "blood_pressure" REAL /* Blood pressure in mmHg */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage */,
  "muscle_mass" REAL /* Muscle mass in kg */,
  "bone_density" REAL /* Bone density in g/cm^3 */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the feedback is related to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the simulation (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments regarding the simulation */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., simulation accuracy, user experience) */,
  "feedback_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the feedback */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation associated with this parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the simulation parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the fitness activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fitness activity */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" REAL /* Estimated calories burned per hour for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_fitness_activities" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fitness activity */,
  "activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the fitness activity (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_fitness_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_fitness_activities_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES fitness_activities ("activity_id")
)
